results.rendered_html:
pra-√dhṛṣ P. -dharṣati, -dhṛṣṇoti, to be bold against, assail with courage or daring, lay hands on, hurt, injure, harass, overpower, overcome,  R.  :
Caus. P. -dharṣayati id.,  ib. ;  KauṣĀr. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to violate (a woman),  MBh. ;
to destroy, devastate,  R.

pradhṛṣ 5 P.
1 To assail, lay hands on.
2 To injure, harass.
3 To overpower overcome.
— Caus.
1 To assail, attack; overpower.
2 To outrage, violate (a woman).
3 To injure, hurt.
4 To devastate, lay waste, destroy completely.
